title: Extract business logic from a fat controller into a service
instruction: userController.ts mixes HTTP handling with validation, persistence, and email logic in one 200-line handler. Extract the non-HTTP logic into a UserService with focused methods, leaving the controller as a thin adapter. Behavior and the existing passing tests must not change; add tests for the new service.

criteria.guidance: Is the logic cleanly separated with a thin controller and cohesive service?
Do existing tests still pass unchanged and is behavior identical?
